title: Ixora vandersticheleorum
taxonomy: Ixora vandersticheleorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the Democratic Republic of the Congo. It is a member of the Rubiaceae family, which also includes coffee and gardenias. The classification of Ixora vandersticheleorum is further divided into the genus Ixora, which comprises about 600 species. Its classification is a part of ongoing research in the field of botany.

intro: Ixora vandersticheleorum, commonly known as the Ixora plant or Jungle Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer.
